errors.alreadyExists: An adapter for this platform already exists in this workspace
errors.encryptionKeyMissing: Adapter encryption key is not configured

chatgpt.name: ChatGPT
chatgpt.description: OpenAI ChatGPT with web search for citation extraction

errors.modelNotSupported: Model {model} does not support web search
errors.citationExtractionFailed: Failed to extract citations from ChatGPT response

perplexity.name: Perplexity
perplexity.description: Perplexity AI search with native citation extraction

errors.citationExtractionFailed: Failed to extract citations from Perplexity response

claude.name: Claude
claude.description: Anthropic Claude with web search for citation extraction

errors.citationExtractionFailed: Failed to extract citations from Claude response
errors.webSearchNotEnabled: Web search is not enabled for this Anthropic organization. Enable it in the Anthropic Console.
errors.billingError: Anthropic billing error: check your account balance and plan
errors.overloaded: Anthropic API is temporarily overloaded, retrying

gemini.name: Gemini
gemini.description: Google Gemini with grounding for Google Search citation extraction

errors.modelNotSupported: Model {model} does not support grounding with Google Search
errors.citationExtractionFailed: Failed to extract citations from Gemini response
errors.safetyBlocked: Gemini blocked the response due to safety settings
errors.recitationBlocked: Gemini blocked the response due to recitation filter
errors.noGroundingData: Gemini response did not include grounding metadata

aio.name: AI Overviews
aio.description: Google AI Overviews extracted from search results via SERP API

errors.citationExtractionFailed: Failed to extract citations from AI Overviews response
errors.pageTokenExpired: AI Overview page token expired before retrieval

config.serpProviderDescription: Third-party SERP API used to access Google AI Overviews (searchapi or dataforseo)

grok.name: Grok
grok.description: xAI Grok with web search and X search for citation extraction

errors.citationExtractionFailed: Failed to extract citations from Grok response

config.enableXSearchDescription: Include X (Twitter) posts in search results for social media citation tracking

deepseek.name: DeepSeek
deepseek.description: DeepSeek AI (China-hosted) for training-data-based brand visibility analysis

errors.insufficientBalance: DeepSeek API balance depleted. Top up at platform.deepseek.com
errors.insufficientResource: DeepSeek ran out of compute resources, retrying

deepseek.noCitations: DeepSeek does not provide web search or citations. Brand visibility is analyzed from response text content.

copilot.name: Microsoft Copilot
copilot.description: Microsoft Copilot with Bing Search for citation extraction via third-party SERP APIs

errors.invalidApiKey: Invalid SerpAPI API key for Copilot adapter
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid DataForSEO credentials for Copilot adapter
errors.citationExtractionFailed: Failed to extract citations from Copilot response
errors.unexpectedResponseShape: Unexpected SERP provider response structure from {provider}

openrouter.name: OpenRouter
openrouter.description: Shared API key for OpenRouter-backed signal sources. This adapter only stores the credential — enable individual OpenRouter platforms (Sonar Pro, GPT-4o + Exa, etc.) to query.

openrouter-sonar-pro.name: OpenRouter — Sonar Pro
openrouter-sonar-pro.description: Perplexity Sonar Pro proxied via OpenRouter. Same grounding as the native Perplexity adapter — distinct from native Perplexity only in billing/account.

openrouter-gpt4o-online.name: OpenRouter — GPT-4o + Exa
openrouter-gpt4o-online.description: OpenAI GPT-4o grounded via Exa search through OpenRouter. Distinct signal from native ChatGPT — citations come from Exa, not OpenAI's web_search tool.

openrouter-claude-online.name: OpenRouter — Claude + Exa
openrouter-claude-online.description: Anthropic Claude grounded via Exa search through OpenRouter. Distinct signal from native Claude — citations come from Exa, not Anthropic's web_search tool.

openrouter-deepseek.name: OpenRouter — DeepSeek
openrouter-deepseek.description: DeepSeek Chat via OpenRouter. No web grounding; measures parametric brand knowledge only.

openrouter-free.name: OpenRouter — Free auto-router
openrouter-free.description: OpenRouter routes each request to whatever free-tier model is currently available. Free-pool composition rotates frequently — override `orModel` per row to pin a specific :free slug. No web grounding by default.
